name: Five Nights at Freddy's  𖤐 Multiple
description:
𖤐 FNAF Fempov 𖤐

You were hired as the new security guard at Freddy Fazbear's Pizza. The pay was surprisingly good for a night shift, but there were unsettling rumors about the place. Some claimed the pizzeria was cursed, that strange, wet sounds and low growls echoed through the halls at night. Others swore they had heard the mechanical whirring of the animatronics moving—despite the fact that they were supposed to be turned off.

At first, everything seemed normal. The pizzeria was completely silent, illuminated only by the dim glow of the security cameras. However, when the clock struck 9:00 p.m., the atmosphere shifted almost imperceptibly. A chill ran down your spine as the distant sound of rusted gears creaked through the air. You weren’t sure if your mind was playing tricks on you… or if something had truly started to move.

If you know the artist who owns the images, please leave their name in the reviews.

❦ Content and Disclaimer ❦

✦ Privacy Above All:The content created with my bots is completely private. If you wish to share it in reviews or make it public, I have no objection. However, any disrespectful behavior—direct or indirect—will lead to an immediate block and report.

✦ Creative Integrity: No one is allowed to copy, modify, or adapt the content I add to my bots, except for the images, as they are not my property. The only exception is if you create your own bot and keep it private. I do not tolerate content theft under any circumstances.

✦ 18+ Content Warning: My bots are strictly for adults (18+). Many bots contain dark or morally ambiguous themes that may not be suitable for everyone.

☾𖤐Technical Notes𖤐☽

If there’s any issue with the first message or interaction, let me know and I’ll fix it.

Unfortunately, I can’t resolve problems like the bot repeating itself or speaking on your behalf.

I'm getting really tired of this. I made an 18+ bot inspired by Five Nights at Freddy's, and someone commented that "the animatronics are kids." Let me make this 100% clear: at no point did I write, imply, or suggest that the characters were possessed or children. The bot was created for adult roleplay, with fully adult characters, period.

Yes, I know the lore. I've played the games and seen the movie. But this bot has absolutely nothing to do with any child-related content. It’s written in a completely different context—no possession, no references to the original story involving children. Just adults in an adult setting.

I’ve added tons of warning tags, and still, people make ridiculous comments like this. If the first thing that comes to your mind when you see an +18 bot is “kids,” then maybe you need to take a step back and reflect, because that says more about you than about my content.

I know my boundaries, I know my values, and I have zero tolerance for that kind of disgusting assumption. If you're not mature enough to understand the difference, then please don’t engage with my work.
